# AlphaLux Cleaning
> Eco-conscious, non-toxic house cleaning company serving 17 cities across Texas and California. Mobile service — we come to you.

## Contact
- Phone: (972) 559-0223
- Email: info@alphaluxclean.com
- Hours: Mon-Sat 8:00 AM – 6:00 PM, Sun by appointment
- Website: https://www.alphaluxclean.com
- GBP: https://share.google/UG6ei8NirJNiDuHDi

## Services (base: https://www.alphaluxclean.com/services/)
- Standard Cleaning — From $129 — /standard-cleaning
- Deep Cleaning — From $249 — /deep-cleaning
- Move Out Cleaning — From $299 — /move-out-cleaning
- Recurring Cleaning — From $99/visit — /recurring-cleaning
- Airbnb Cleaning — From $139 — /airbnb-cleaning
- One-Time Cleaning — From $179 — /one-time-cleaning
- Vacation Rental Cleaning — From $149 — /vacation-rental-cleaning
- Post Construction Cleaning — From $399 — /post-construction-cleaning

## Service Areas — Texas (base: https://www.alphaluxclean.com/locations/tx/)
Dallas · Fort Worth · Austin · Houston · San Antonio

## Service Areas — California (base: https://www.alphaluxclean.com/locations/ca/)
Beverly Hills · Brentwood · Glendale · Pasadena · Los Angeles · Santa Monica · Hollywood · Long Beach · Huntington Beach · Anaheim · Irvine · Sacramento
